author: holgerd77
content:
Hi hi, just also announced on <#745077610685661265>, I am thinking for some time now how one can harness all the thoughts and basically intellectual work one is having during protocol implementation and will now do a vibe-coding experiment where I will basically live-generate "docs out of thoughts" along the way (so: along implementation".

I'll use **EIP-8141 Frame Transactions** as a playing ground, so will do a vibe-coded implementation (in TypeScript) here https://github.com/feelyourprotocol/ethereumjs-monorepo/pull/1 and generate structured docs along the way which will update on each PR (automatically):
https://eip-8141-docs.feelyourprotocol.org/

Happy for feedback, excited how this will be going! 😃
